{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Vroshir incursion
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Vroshir incursion]] broke the restriction-bars defending [[Threshold]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
